case_title: CHINN, TRINA STACI VS LEE, GARY RICKY C/O WESTERN MESSENGER SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY CHINN, TRINA STACI AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, GARY RICKY C/O WESTERN MESSENGER SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
